powers.label: Feral Whispers
powers.description: Speak with and command animals; extend simple instructions.

powers.notes: BP +2 to determine Blood Surge bonus in Frenzy

powers.label: A Taste for Blood
powers.description: Learn a target's Blood Potency, Hunger, and other vitae traits from a sample.

powers.label: Blood Walk
powers.description: Ritual: trace a Kindred's recent movements through their vitae.

powers.label: Fleetness
powers.description: Move with supernatural speed for brief bursts.

powers.label: Rapid Reflexes
powers.notes: + Celerity dots to non-combat dex tests
powers.description: + Celerity dots to non-combat dex tests

powers.label: Din of the Damned
powers.description: Ceremony: fill an area with wailing spirits that hinder foes.

powers.label: Lethal Body
powers.description: Unarmed attacks inflict Aggravated damage to mortals and some supernaturals.

powers.label: Far Reach
powers.description: Thin-blood formula: extend reach and grip at a distance.

powers.label: Haze
powers.description: Thin-blood formula: obscure an area with supernatural fog.
